title: Morbid Reborn Reborn Reborn
description: This Mod recreates The Morbid Harvester Boss from the old mod "Mob Fusion", Plus its Drop the "Morbid Harvester Arm"
body:
Currently It just adds The Morbid Harvester Boss, Plus its Drop the "Morbid Harvester Arm". Aswell as being summoned by placing 2 Obsidian Blocks ontop of each other with a wither skeleton skull on top, and right clicking it with a nether star to summon the boss.

The biggest difference in the boss from the previous Morbid Reborn Reborn version is my version of Morbid Can Crawl into 2 block gaps.

Will This Mod be Updated in the Future:
Damage, Health and Armor Values Are all subject to change in the future and future version ports may be possible if they are popular like 1.20.1.

Does This mod have the permission from the original Creator:
Yes, FiskFille (Creator) is fine with people porting the Mob Fusion mod.
If you would like to check out the original mod check out https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/mob-fusion
